nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Documents the server environment variables for local MySQL, JWT signing, AI providers, runtime settings, email digests, and Railway production deployment.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Defines the Bun-based Express server package, its API and database dependencies, and commands for development, tests, evaluation workflows, and daily email digests.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses native ES modules and Bun scripts to run the TypeScript server without a separate compilation command.
